scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix remitbikas/frontend && npm install --prefix remitbikas/backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix remitbikas/backend" "npm run dev --prefix remitbikas/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix remitbikas/frontend && npm run build --prefix remitbikas/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix remitbikas/frontend && npm run lint --prefix remitbikas/backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup --prefix remitbikas/backend
